lines: Please come back. I miss you more than I know how to say and I think about you every single day.
I know I messed up. I know sorry does not fix everything but I mean it with everything I have.
You are the only person I want to talk to when something good happens and the only one I want when things go wrong.
I am not asking you to forget anything. I just want the chance to be better. To be what you deserve.
Please give me one more chance. I will spend every day making sure you never regret it.
